channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Popular joint supplement glucosamine linked to faster Alzheimer's progression
item.description: A major study suggests glucosamine, a common joint pain supplement, may be linked to faster progression from mild cognitive impairment to Alzheimer's.

item.title: Earth's first animals barely evolved until sex changed everything
item.description: Earth's earliest animals may have slowed evolution by reproducing asexually, creating stable communities that changed little.

item.title: Stonehenge's most mysterious stone traveled 700 kilometers across Britain
item.description: Scientists have uncovered new evidence that Stonehenge’s six-ton Altar Stone was deliberately transported hundreds of kilometers from Scotland by ancient builders.

item.title: Podcast: Bringing quantum concepts into classrooms
item.description: Erica Carlson and Muhsin Menekse discuss how their collaboration is inspiring the next generation of STEM workforce through a quantum education program.
